steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The notes emphasize 1969 as the year Martin Kessler won the A.M. Turing Award. This specific year is the decisive clue for emphasizing when he won the award, not his contributions or the award’s description.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content:
The wording ‘It was in 1969…’ places the year at the forefront to stress timing.

Mentioning the award’s prestige, Kessler’s category as a winner, or his technical contributions shifts the focus away from the year.

B is correct.
